subject: Write Context7 documentation fetching integration
description:
Write the skill section that integrates Context7 MCP tools for dynamic documentation fetching across all three target platforms.

The Context7 integration should:

1. **Platform documentation lookup** — Instructions for using Context7 to fetch:
   - Generic Agent Skills (agentskills.io) specification
   - OpenCode skill documentation
   - Codex skill documentation

2. **When to invoke** — Define triggers for dynamic research:
   - On-demand: User explicitly requests research
   - Proactive: Agent detects uncertainty about platform-specific nuances
   - Startup: Compare fetched docs against embedded knowledge versions (feeds into spec version tracking)

3. **Tool usage instructions** — Specific Context7 MCP tool calls:
   - `resolve-library-id` for finding correct library IDs
   - `query-docs` with targeted keywords for pulling relevant snippets
   - How to interpret and apply fetched documentation

4. **Result integration** — How to use fetched docs:
   - Supplement embedded knowledge with latest information
   - Override embedded knowledge when fetched docs are more current
   - Note any discrepancies between embedded and fetched versions

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] Context7 integration covers all three platforms
- [ ] On-demand and proactive research triggers defined
- [ ] Tool usage instructions are specific and actionable
- [ ] Fetched results properly integrated with embedded knowledge
- [ ] Startup version comparison flow defined

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Context7 unavailable — handled by fallback (separate task)
- [ ] Fetched docs conflict with embedded — prefer fetched, note discrepancy

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Context7 timeout or error handled gracefully
- [ ] Research status clearly communicated to user during fetch

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Invoke Context7 for each platform and verify useful docs returned
• Manual: Test proactive research trigger during interview
• Manual: Verify version comparison against embedded knowledge

Source: internal/specs/create-skill-SPEC.md Sections 5.4, 9.3
